hypothesis: On the current live catalog, an entity-token policy with an equal-game 20/25/30-round critic can preserve V23 behavior while representing late-game conversion state better than the flat incumbent. Model size helps only if held-out solo strength and calibration improve enough to justify its latency.

behaviorCheckpoint.role: The frozen V23 checkpoint is the data-generating policy. It acts from obs-v1 with hybrid sampling at temperature 0.55 while the recorder writes paired obs-v1 and obs-v2 rows.

training.validation: separate complete-game seed block; best validation policy CE epoch
training.comparisonNote: The first screen is data- and epoch-matched, not FLOP-matched. It establishes the strength/latency Pareto frontier; any apparent size winner requires a later compute-matched causal confirmation. Each size has one pinned initialization/shuffle seed, so a size ranking inside a two-percentage-point paired win-rate band or overlapping simultaneous confidence intervals is a tie, not evidence of capacity causality.
reportPerVariant: estimated forward FLOPs at 32 rows and 30 candidates
training wall time and examples per second

integrity: catalog and behavior checkpoint hashes match
all rows carry obsV2 length 3419 and action width 104
zero malformed rows and zero stalls
complete solo outcomes have reach30Target, reach30Horizon, endRound, objectiveDone, and finalVP
training, validation, and development evaluation have no shared game ids or absolute seeds

directSolo.control: V23 behavior checkpoint on the exact 512 evaluation seeds
directSolo.pairedAnalysis: Match true-win outcomes by absolute seed. Report discordant counts, exact McNemar p-values, paired deltas, and paired bootstrap confidence intervals for VP, finish round, and post-15 pace.
directSolo.noninferiorityScreen: Point delta must be at least -2.0 percentage points and its ordinary paired 95% lower bound must be at least -5.0 points.
directSolo.advanceToPpo: A treatment must improve at least +3.0 percentage points, have a positive Bonferroni-simultaneous 98.33% paired lower bound across the three variants, and survive Holm correction of exact McNemar p-values at familywise alpha 0.05. The later PPO pilot remains an independent confirmation, not a continuation of these development games.

systems.latencyProtocol: A100-40GB, binary inference wire, 32 rows/request, 30 candidates/row, eight closed-loop clients after warmup; report request p50/p95/p99, per-row equivalent, batch distribution, and throughput.

paretoAxes: simultaneous paired true-win-rate lower bound versus V23
held-out policy cross-entropy and per-horizon critic calibration
stopRule: Train all three preregistered variants once. Do not tune on the 512-game evaluation block. Advance at most the variants that are nondominated on the declared Pareto axes and pass the multiplicity-corrected direct-solo advance gate. Otherwise retain the negative result and return to representation features or targets.
